name: ai1-crhq-installer
description: Install CRHQ resources (skills, agents, recipes) and services into a CRHQ satellite

scripts.test: node tests/skill-recipe.test.mjs && node tests/agent.test.mjs && node tests/job.test.mjs && node tests/runner.test.mjs && node tests/service.test.mjs && node tests/filter.test.mjs && node tests/options.test.mjs && node tests/install-log.test.mjs && node tests/backup.test.mjs

comment: No runtime dependencies — yaml is vendored at scripts/lib/vendor/yaml.mjs so the skill installs without npm install. To regenerate that bundle, install yaml as a devDependency and run the esbuild command in its header.
